productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's Minnie Summer Time Pink Top
description: CompositionPink sleeveless top in 100% cotton with green and white polka dot spaghetti straps and piping along the neckline and sleeves, green stitch detailing along the hem and Minnie Mouse print on the chestWash care1. Machine wash in cold water with gentle cycle using mild detergent2. Wash dark colours seperately3. Do not bleach4. Do not soak or wring5. Dry inside-out6. Do not tumble dry7. Do not iron on print and studsFittingComfort FitDesigned for that comfortable-yet-stylish look for your little princess, this pink top from disney is a perfect summer wear. The cotton fabric and sleeveless cut will keep your little girl well ventilated and dry, while the polka dotted straps and sleeve and neck lining adds a stylish twist to the entire outfit. Pair it with pretty footwear from the crocs collection available at myntra, include colourful jibbitz, and transform your little darling into a princess.
